warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): t3 classified this view as 'schedule' (สัญลักษณ์ | รายการสุขภัณฑ์ table). Under the new 13-type taxonomy this page is a textbook fit for the new pattern 'symbol' ('เป็นตารางนิยามสัญลักษณ์ ไม่ใช่รายการวัสดุแบบ material_list') -- it defines what each abbreviation/symbol MEANS (WC.1='โถส้วมแบบนั่งราบ...' etc.), not a quantity/BOQ-style table. Reclassified accordingly; element content identical to t3, no data change.

This sheet also contains a mounting-height elevation strip ('มาตรฐานระดับการติดตั้งสุขภัณฑ์') at the bottom, kept in this same file (not split out) since it is directly part of the same symbol/reference legend -- it supplies the mount_height_m value for each symbol defined above, not a separate independent view.
Floor-mounted items (WC.1, WC.2, F1, M., FD.) correctly have no mounting-height dimension printed and are left null -- never invented.
This sheet also contains a second, unrelated view (แปลนห้องน้ำ WC.1 floor plan, 1:25, pattern 'plan') -- see sibling file _หน้า11_wc1_plan.json.

Independent read done first (own pass through both the symbol table and the elevation strip), then cross-checked against t3's หน้า11_fixture_schedule.json: identical 14 items, descriptions, and mount heights. No content disagreement -- only the pattern classification and filename changed.
